repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type DETECTOR_UNIT_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 25 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      propagation_speed 0 m/s
      network_name group_comm_example_net
   end_comm
   processor report_processor WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
      update_interval 2 sec
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type RELAY_UNIT_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 25 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      propagation_speed 0 m/s
      network_name group_comm_example_net
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type OBSERVER_UNIT_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 25 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      propagation_speed 0 m/s
      network_name group_comm_example_net
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform detector_unit DETECTOR_UNIT_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e speed 20 knots
   end_route
   comm group_network
      on
   end_comm
   processor report_processor
      on
   end_processor
end_platform

platform relay_unit RELAY_UNIT_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.70n 104.10e speed 20 knots
   end_route
   comm group_network
      on
   end_comm
end_platform

platform observer_unit OBSERVER_UNIT_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.73n 104.13e speed 20 knots
   end_route
   comm group_network
      on
   end_comm
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/group_comm_example.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   file output/group_comm_example.evt
end_event_output

end_time 240 sec
